mapper.select: /* SQL ID: www.api.mmp.map.Map.selectMapListCount Description : 목록에서 레코드수 Query */ SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM map

/* SQL ID: www.api.mmp.map.Map.selectMapDetail Description : 상세조회 Query */ SELECT MAP_IDX ,TITLE ,MAP_GRP_IDX ,MAP_NM ,CONTENT ,LAT ,LNG ,CREATE_USER ,DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DATE ,UPDATE_USER ,DATE_FORMAT(UPDATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATE_DATE
FROM map WHERE MAP_IDX = #{mapIdx}
mapper.update:
/* SQL ID: www.api.mmp.map.Map.updateMap Description : 수정 Query */ UPDATE map
TITLE = #{title},
MAP_GRP_IDX = #{mapGrpIdx},
MAP_NM = #{mapNm},
CONTENT = #{content},
LAT = #{lat},
LNG = #{lng},
CREATE_USER = #{createUser},
CREATE_DATE = STR_TO_DATE(#{createDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'),
UPDATE_USER = #{updateUser},
UPDATE_DATE = STR_TO_DATE(#{updateDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'),
WHERE MAP_IDX = #{mapIdx}
